arguments.statement: James 2:24 and Romans 3:28 use δικαιόω in complementary forensic senses when harmonized through Calvin's doctrine of synergistic justification.

citations.text: ...we are justified, not by the infusion of righteousness, but by pardon... works follow in the course of justification...
Ye see then how that by works a man is justified, and not by faith only.
